ode)return 1===t.code?"ok":t.message||"internal_error"}(a),op:e["sentry.op"],origin:e["sentry.origin"],links:c&&c.length>0?c.map(({context:{spanId:t,traceId:e,traceFlags:n,...r},attributes:i})=>({span_id:t,trace_id:e,sampled:1===n,attributes:i,...r})):void 0}}return{span_id:n,trace_id:r,start_timestamp:0,data:{}}}function nN(t){return t._sentryRootSpan||t}function nI(){nj||(ew(()=>{console.warn("[Sentry] Returning null from `beforeSendSpan` is disallowed. nC(t,e){let{extra:n,tags:r,attributes:i,user:o,contexts:s,level:a,sdkProcessingMetadata:c,breadcrumbs:u,fingerprint:l,eventProcessors:h,attachments:f,propagationContext:p,transactionName:d,span:m}=e;nD(t,"extra",n),nD(t,"tags",r),nD(t,"attributes",i),nD(t,"user",o),nD(t,"contexts",s),t.sdkProcessingMetadata=eK(t.sdkProcessingMetadata,c,2),a&&(t.level=a),d&&(t.transactionName=d),m&&(t.span=m),u.length&&(t.breadcrumbs=[...t.breadcrumbs,...u]),l.length&&(t.fingerprint=[...t.fingerprint,...l]),h.length&&(t.eventProcessors=[...t.eventProcessors,...h]),f.length&&(t.attachments=[...t.attachments,...f]),t.propagationContext={...t.propagationContext,...p}}function
